title: astragalus angustissimus
intro: Astragalus angustissimus, also known as the Narrowleaf Milk Vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an adaptogen, which means it helps the body adapt to stress and promotes balance and well-being. The plant has been traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus angustissimus is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
